Xin Li

About Me

    Welcome! My name is Xin Li, I’m currently a computer science graduate student at UCSD. I received my Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science from Sichuan University in June 2020. At Sichuan University, I took part in several research activities of image processing and medical image denoising, and discovered my interests in image algorithms and graphics.

Projects

This section shows results of some of my projects. You can find the implementation for most of them in my github repository.

Physics Simulation

In this project, I simulate the kinematics of some classic physics models including fluids, rigid body, finite elements, and rendering using OpenGL.

Fluid
